site.title: Gulu la Ogwira Ntchito Padziko Lonse Lapansi
site.tagline: Kufunika kokhala ndi mwayi wopezeka m'mabanki a anthu onse
nav.label: Zoyamba
meta.home.description: IATF imatembenuza zosowa zenizeni zopezeka kukhala malo osungira anthu onse otseguka.
meta.projects.description: Fufuzani m'mapulojekiti opezeka kwa anthu onse ofalitsidwa kudzera mu IATF.
meta.propose.description: Pemphani polojekiti ya IATF yokhudza kupezeka kwa zinthu kudzera pa intaneti, imelo, kapena Discord.
meta.governance.description: Werengani kuti mudziwe mmene bungwe la IATF limavomerezera mapulojekiti, limayendetsera nkhokwe zake, ndiponso limaonetsetsa kuti ntchitoyo ikupezeka kwa anthu onse.
meta.join.description: Njira zotenga nawo mbali mu IATF: perekani code, kumasulira, kuyesa, kapena kusunga polojekiti.
meta.accessibility.description: Mmene bungwe la IATF likufunira kuti webusaitiyi ikhale yosavuta kupeza komanso mmene mungachitire lipoti la zinthu zimene zingakulepheretseni kupeza zinthuzo.
meta.transparency.description: Zolemba pagulu za IATF: zisankho, mapulojekiti, ndi zosintha zimasungidwa zotseguka mwachisawawa.
registry.empty.title: Palibe mapulojekiti ofalitsidwabe
proposal.form.title: Tumizani pempho
proposal.form.body: Lembani fomu ili m'munsiyi kuti mutumize pempho ku IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript ikufunika kuti mugwiritse ntchito fomu ya pa intanetiyi. Ngati silikupezeka, gwiritsani ntchito imelo kapena Discord m'malo mwake.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live kugonjera si kukhazikitsidwa mu chilengedwe ichi. Fomu iyi adzatsegula wanu imelo kasitomala m'malo.
proposal.form.ready: Pamene mutumiza pempho, bungwe la IATF lidzapanga mbiri ya kuitanidwa.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Chonde malizitsani kufufuza chitetezo cha spam musanatumize.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Chitetezo cha spam chatha. Chonde lembani cheke kachiwiri musanatumize.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Chitetezo cha spam sichinatsimikizidwe pakali pano. Chonde yesaninso.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Chitetezo cha spam chatha. Chonde yesaninso.
proposal.form.success: Zikomo, pempho lanu talandira ndi kulisunga kuti tione.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ngati mulankhulanso ndi IATF za pempholi, lembani zomwe zili m'munsizi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: chinachake chinalakwika pamene kutumiza pempho. Chonde yesaninso. Ngati vuto akupitiriza, ntchito imelo m'malo.
project.detail.problemTitle: Kodi ndi vuto lotani limene polojekitiyi ikuthetsa
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Chiyambi cha Chingelezi chosavuta, matembenuzidwe angawonjezeredwe pambuyo pake
footer.label: Tsamba la pansi pa tsamba
footer.blurb: Ntchito yopezeka mosavuta iyenera kukhala yosavuta kuyamba, yosavuta kufalitsa, ndi yosavuta kukhala yotseguka.
footer.source: Kupezeka kwa miyezo yothandiza: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Zochita zophunzitsidwa ndi ogwiritsa ntchito matekinoloje othandizira.
contact.label: Kuyankhulana
translation.label: Mkhalidwe wa kumasulira
translation.source: Chingelezi ndicho chinenero chovomerezeka cha tsamba lino.
translation.humanReviewed: Baibulo limeneli lakonzedwanso ndi wolankhula bwino.
translation.machineAssisted: Izi kumasulira ndi makina mothandizidwa ndipo sanayambe kwathunthu kuwunikiridwa ndi wokamba bwino. malingaliro ali olandiridwa kudzera GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Baibulo limeneli linakonzedwanso chisanafike chatsopano cha Chingelezi ndipo lingafunikire kukonzedwanso.
translation.report: Fotokozani vuto la kumasulira: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ndilibe nazo ntchito .
